Brad —

Thanks again for the time on Monday. Three attachments below.

**2. Sample contract analysis** — the actual product output. Generated by the live system this morning against a synthetic PBM agreement. Worth a skim before forwarding the one-pager so you know exactly what your name is attached to.

**3. Legal review brief** — what ClearScript does, the data flow, and six numbered questions I would like your read on. The most important is Question 1 on the unauthorized practice of law line.
